examples: During the rest of the time, I got a title "the Infamous Perjurer Twain" on this paper.
Gentile subscribed it reluctantly, but in the upshot he was condemned and imprisoned as a perjurer.
They have done so even in instances where the perjurer complained that the government exceeded its constitutional powers in making the inquiry.
Bill Clinton, whom some Americans regard as a perjurer, is not in a good position to lecture anybody about family life and values.
